column1: # Committed source-of-truth (lockfile-style): each cell -> its EXPECTED PASS/FAIL
# under the uniform gate (corr>=0.9999 AND sum_ratio in [0.999,1.001]). fp32
# legitimately misses the gate on the precision-heavy cells; this file records that
# baseline so a correct fp32 run reads as PASS. A cell whose ACTUAL verdict FLIPS vs
# this file (pass<->fail) is the regression signal; run.sh names the flipped cells.
# provenance: seeded from the validated desktop-5090 run (184 PASS / 136 FAIL of 320),
# regenerate deliberately and review the diff, like cells/.
